text.title: TypeScript Test Fixtures and Factories
text.summary: TypeScript factory helpers, fishery factories, and Jest fixture patterns for frontend and Node.js tests.

rule.statement: Export a `create{Entity}` factory function from `__fixtures__/{entity}.ts` that accepts `Partial<Entity>` overrides. Never export hard-coded literal objects as the primary test data.
rule.rationale: Literal objects cannot express variants without duplication. Factory functions with overrides allow each test to specify only the attributes relevant to its scenario.

example.note: `sequence` is deterministic per factory instance. `buildList` creates N unique instances.
